seoTitle: Lake Austin vs Lake Brown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Austin and Lake Brown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Austin vs Lake Brown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Austin and Lake Brown.
heading: Lake Austin vs Lake Brown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Austin, Western Australia and Lake Brown, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Austin has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Lake Brown (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Austin or Lake Brown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Austin has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Lake Brown scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Austin scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Brown scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Austin or Lake Brown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Austin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
